title: Generic processor provider for EXPOSE plugins
description: Lightweight generic processor provider acting as an execution service for the EXPOSE (EXecutables for OGC API PrOcesses and Scientific Environments) platform. It receives execution requests from pygeoapi process plugins, executes configured scientific command-line programs, and returns execution status and results. See README.md for detailed architecture and usage documentation.

creators.name: Martinelli, Francesco
creators.affiliation: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)

related_identifiers._comment: Plugins for the EXPOSE platform project
pybox: Scientific processing code executed via these plugins
